# Yusuf Arbac - Cloud-Native Security & SOC Architecture

Security Engineer specializing in Cloud-Native Security, SOC Architecture, and Open Source Defense.

## About
Yusuf Talha ARABACI is a professional Security Engineer with expertise in malware analysis, pentesting, and designing resilient security operations. This site serves as a technical blog and professional portfolio.

## Key Sections
- [Posts](https://yusufarbc.dev/posts/): Technical write-ups on cybersecurity, malware analysis, and security tools.
- [About](https://yusufarbc.dev/about/): Detailed professional background, projects, and certifications.
- [Turkish Version](https://yusufarbc.dev/tr/): Turkish localized content.

## Technical Skills
- Cloud Security (Azure, AWS)
- SIEM/XDR (SentinelOne, Wazuh, Elastic)
- SOC Architecture & eBPF
- Malware Analysis & Forensics
